title: Variables: naming your stuff
body: A *variable* is a name you attach to a value so you can use it later. `age = 30` stores 30 under the name `age`; after that, writing `age` gives you 30. You can change it — `age = 31` — and the name now points to the new value. Names should say what they hold (`total`, `name`, `count`), not `x` or `thing`. Every challenge from here uses variables to hold values while you work.
